_publications._publicationTitle: RENOVO-NF1 accurately predicts NF1 missense variant pathogenicity.

_contextSnippet: As of July 2024, 13,460 NF1 variants are listed; most (5082, 37.7%) are classified as VUS
details: Contains 13,460 NF1 variants as of July 2024, with 5082 (37.7%) classified as VUS and 5198 (38.6%) being missense variants
